chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1853 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case 14.01.2021 Mr. Saeed Shams Memon Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Hashim Leghari Advocate for the respondent No.4. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. === In compliance of order dated 24.09.2020, Habibullah Mahar, Divisional Mechanical Engineer, is present on behalf of respondent No.4. He states that the application submitted by the petitioner for premature retirement has been accepted by the respondents, however, his retirement order was not issued as he is absent from duty since long. He further submits that as soon as he joins the service, his retirement order will be issued and his dues shall be settled in accordance with law. Petitioner Muhammad Saleem, who is present in person, is satisfied with the above statement and seeks disposal of this petition in terms thereof. He undertakes to join his duty within seven days from today. If the petitioner joins his duty, respondents 2 to 4 shall issue his retirement order and shall settle his dues strictly in accordance with law within a period of thirty days from the date of his joining. By consent, the petition stands disposed of in the above terms with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE g
